debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Arch
state : SystemState
reqType : BasicRequest
tId : ThreadId
prelimReq : Request := ⋯
previous : List Request := ⋯
removed : List Request := ⋯
occurrences : List Nat := ⋯
req : Request := ⋯
pairedRequest? : Option Request := ⋯
requests' : RequestArray := ⋯
orderConstraints' : OrderConstraints := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed → id ∈ reqIds requests'

failed_attempts:
fun id h => by
      simp only [List.mem_map, Request.id] at h
      obtain ⟨r, hr, rfl⟩ := h
      exact (List.mem_of_mem_insert _ _).mpr (Or.inl hr)

fun id h => by
      simp_all [reqIds, RequestArray.mem_insert]
      <;> aesop

fun id h => by
      simp only [List.mem_map, exists_prop] at h
      obtain ⟨r, hr, rfl⟩ := h
      simp [reqIds, RequestArray.mem_insert]
      exact Or.inl (Set.mem_of_mem_insert hr)

fun id h => by
      simp only [List.mem_map, List.mem_append, reqIds] at *
      apply Or.inl
      exact h

fun id h => by
      simp only [List.mem_map, Request.id] at h
      obtain ⟨r, hr, rfl⟩ := h
      exact (by
        simp only [reqIds, List.mem_bind, List.mem_map, Request.id]
        apply List.mem_of_mem_take
        apply List.mem_cons.mpr
        left
        exact List.mem_of_mem_insert hr)

fun id h => by
      simp only [List.mem_map, List.mem_append, reqIds, RequestArray.toList, RequestArray.val] at *
      aesop

fun id h => by
      simp only [List.mem_map, List.mem_append, reqIds] at *
      aesop

fun id h => by

      apply List.mem_of_mem_take
      apply List.mem_map_of_mem
      exact RequestArray.mem_insert_self _ _
